name: Clean Energy Technologies, Inc.
summary: Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. (CETY) is a Nevada-incorporated company with operations in North America, Europe, and Asia. It operates natural gas trading operations in China through its PRC subsidiaries and a 49% equity interest in Sichuan Hongzuo Shuya Energy Limited (Shuya), sourcing and supplying natural gas to industries and municipalities in China. The company also has clean energy technology operations across multiple continents.

products.name: Natural Gas Supply
products.description: Sourcing and supplying natural gas to industries and municipalities located in China through PRC subsidiaries and Shuya.

partnerships.description: CETY holds a 49% equity interest in Shuya, which operates natural gas trading operations in China.
